author: SantiMod
content:
Hello Community! On Wednesday at 9pm UTC we will be hosting “Who Wants to be an Atlassianaire” 3rd edition and last one before the Grand Metaverse Final!   
 You will be competing for one Discovery of Iris poster and Discord XP, which will then be exchangeable for higher chances of Early Access and other cool benefits…
 To register as a competitor, react to this message with " ".
You can find the rules of the competition on the ⁠unknown channel

Disclaimer: winning this competition does not automatically grant you Early Access. This will be achieved by being active in the community channels and helping other fellow Community Members. (Discord XP is earned this way, winning this competition is a BIG boost for your discord XP)
